sections.paragraph:
Original: יזּיּה

Transliteration: yizzı̂yâh

Phonetic: yiz-zee-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Jeziah = "Jehovah sprinkles"
  1. a descendant of Parosh who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra

Origin: from the same as the first part of H3149 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
